---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest something that would make `forge` more useful for local-LLM coding
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**The problem**
What are you trying to do today that `forge` either makes hard or doesn't
support? Concrete examples beat abstract descriptions.

**The proposal**
What you'd like to see. If you have a sense of how it would slot into the
existing module layout (`src/orchestrator`, `src/router`, etc.), say so.

**Why local matters here**
Anything that's only worth building because we're running locally
(determinism, airgap, free retries, fine-tuning, etc.) gets prioritized
over things that just mirror hosted-tool features.

**Alternatives considered**
What you've already tried, and why it wasn't enough.
